name: Hg
overview: European software-specialist buyout firm — among the largest dedicated software investors in Europe. Multiple fund strategies (Saturn for largest, Genesis for upper-mid, Mercury for mid). Known for sector-cluster specialization and high portfolio overlap on cross-platform value creation.
notable: Sector-cluster model: deep specialization in tax/accounting software, ERP, healthcare IT, etc.
bdNotes: EU-headquartered. US-based candidate would need to confirm whether the firm has US-based BD seats or NY/Boston offices currently active.
